# Dr. Kandi Stull, Psy.D, LP

![](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2024/01/KS-Headshot-300x300.png)

Dr. Kandi Stull, Psy.D, LP

Dr. Kandi Stull, Psy.D has specific training/interests in many areas such as: those struggling with Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD), and those in transition. She would be a terrific fit for anyone who needs help navigating his/her life’s path. She is eager to assist those who might need help in   determining or actively changing a career, adding a new role (such as: spouse, parent, empty nester) or someone who is experiencing another major life transition.

Dr. Stull completed her Doctor of Psychology (Psy.D.) at California Southern University, and her Master’s degree in Clinical Mental Health Counseling at Texas A&M University-Commerce. Dr Stull has conducted numerous psychological assessments, and worked with a population that ranges from young children through older aged adults. These evaluations have addressed autism, Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD), mood disorders,  depressive disorders, trauma among other concerns. Additionally, Dr. Stull teaches at the graduate level as an adjunct professor at Grand Canyon University.

## Footer

![Change-Well.com](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2020/02/Change-Well-Logo-White-01.png)

Find help in person or through teletherapy (video conferencing) for Depression, Anxiety or Fears, ADHD and other mental health diagnoses, Relationship and Marriage Counseling, Trauma and PTSD, Couples Therapy, Family Therapy, High Conflict Divorce, Individuals Recovering from Parental Alienation, and Life Transitions, for healthier living, better balance and overall wellness. Obtain an accurate diagnosis/diagnosis clarification, a psychological report or assessment for upcoming surgery or for your prescribing physician or psychiatrist.
